claimText: The WHO Global Conference on Air Pollution and Health was co-organized by the WHO, Columbia, UNEP, and WMO.
evidenceExcerpt: Co-organized by WHO and Columbia and other UN Agencies like UNEP, WMO etc.
examUse: Statement-based question on the organizers of the WHO Global Conference on Air Pollution and Health.
distractorHooks: Organized by World Bank and IMF

claimText: Over 50 countries at the WHO Global Conference on Air Pollution and Health committed to reducing the health impacts of air pollution by 50% by the year 2040.
evidenceExcerpt: Over 50 countries, committed to shared goal of reducing health impacts of air pollution by 50% by 2040.
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific targets set during the WHO Global Conference on Air Pollution and Health.

claimText: India reaffirmed its commitment to the 2040 goal of reducing the health impacts of air pollution under the National Clean Air Programme (NCAP).
evidenceExcerpt: India reaffirmed its commitment by 2040 under National Clean Air Programme.
examUse: Statement-based question linking India's international commitments to its domestic National Clean Air Programme.
distractorHooks: Committed under the National Action Plan on Climate Change (NAPCC)
Committed under the Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
